findings.description: s2 is a spurious extra section with no corresponding source h2 heading. The source transitions directly from「大量データの検索機能」(h2) to「更新(insert、update、delete)」(h2) with only an RST anchor label (`.. _insert_update_delete:`) between them — no intermediate section exists. The s2 hints (更新処理, insert, update, delete) all belong to s3, and s2 content is「なし」.
findings.source_evidence: RST h2 headings visible in source: (1)「大量データの検索機能」with `--------------------`, (2)「更新(insert、update、delete)」with `----------------------------`. The `.. _insert_update_delete:` between them is a label, not a section.

findings.description: s2 content is「なし」(3 characters), which is well below the 50-character threshold.
findings.source_evidence: No source section corresponds to s2; content is「なし」.

findings.description: `SqlResultSet` is referenced by name in the s1 section body (「`retrieve()` の結果 `SqlResultSet` が大量の場合」) but is absent from the s1 hints array.
findings.source_evidence: Source footnote: 「この結果返却されるSqlResultSetのサイズが多い場合は、大量データとなる」and 「SqlResultSetのサイズは最大で20件のため」. Knowledge file s1 body also uses `SqlResultSet` explicitly.
